title: A to Z My First Musical Guitar for Babies, Light and Sound Effects, Educational Musical Toy, 0+ Months, White, Baby
features: INTERACTIVE DESIGN: Guitar-shaped musical toy featuring light-up effects and sound, specially sized for babies' small hands and fingers
AGE APPROPRIATE: Suitable for infants from birth onwards (0+ months), providing early exposure to music and sensory development
EDUCATIONAL VALUE: Features musical notes and colourful blocks marked Do-Mi-So to introduce basic musical concepts
SENSORY ELEMENTS: Includes colourful sliding beads for additional tactile engagement and motor skill development
BATTERY OPERATED: Powered by 3 x 1.5V AAA batteries (included) with easy-access battery compartment for replacement
description: Introduce your little one to the joy of music with the A to Z My First Musical Guitar! Specially designed for babies from birth onwards, this charming musical toy features an adorable guitar shape with colourful blocks displaying 'Do Mi So' notes. The toy comes with engaging light and sound effects that capture your baby's attention while developing their sensory skills. Perfect for tiny hands, it includes a built-in activity ring with colourful beads that helps develop fine motor skills through play. The guitar's compact size and lightweight design make it ideal for little ones to hold and explore. Powered by three AAA batteries (included), this interactive musical toy combines education with entertainment, helping your baby discover rhythm and sound in their earliest months. The durable construction ensures it can withstand the enthusiastic play of curious infants, while the smooth edges provide safe handling for your precious little musician.
